title: Native Doctor project
description: Project configuration at the root of a Native Doctor project folder. Identifies the folder as a project and holds description, metadata, environment sources, and the list of files used in the project.

metadata.description: Extra key/value or structured metadata for the product or tooling.

envSources.description: Environment variable sources (e.g. .env files). Paths are relative to the project root.

path.description: Path to the env file, e.g. '.env' or 'env/production.env'.

files.description: Paths to request/sequence (or other) files used in this project. Paths are relative to the this root of this file's folder
